title: Maria no chibusa
overview: Mao, who can tell when someone will die when she touches them, offers her own body to dying men. One day, Tachibana, whose wife committed suicide after Mao said she would die, draws close to her.

trailers.title: Maria no chibusa 2014 マリアの乳房
